title: Norinchukin Bank Teams Up With CBRE in Push for Higher-Yielding Property Investments
tags: Real Estate: Zero Energy Renovation (Zenobe) & Portfolio ValuationTo achieve carbon neutrality by 2050, Japanese financial institutions are promoting “Zero Energy Renovation (Zenobe) Finance” to upgrade the environmental performance of aging building stocks. This requires a collaborative effort by major banks to address economic hurdles and technical constraints that currently prevent owners from retrofitting older properties. Financial institutionsJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
